hero.title: Hi, I'm Jose Rosano, a passionate
hero.subtitle: Fullstack Developer.
typewriterTexts: I love coding and creating innovative solutions
Explore my projects and learn more about me

about.title: About Me
about.description: Fullstack Developer from Uruguay with over 3 years of continuous web development learning. I enjoy building real products from scratch, learning in the process, and collaborating with teams that aim to grow together.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Here are some of my recent projects.

barberia.title: Barbería
barberia.description: Barber shop reservation system with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Next Auth.

elpreciado.title: El Preciado Viajes
elpreciado.description: Tourism landing and group travel booking for a real client.

reserva5.title: Reservá5
reserva5.description: Football field reservation system with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Next Auth.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: Next.js portfolio with glassmorphism, smooth scroll, and subtle animations.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce
ecommerce.description: Full-stack Next.js store with product catalog and cart; includes admin dashboard.

weather.title: Weather App
weather.description: Real-time weather app using OpenWeatherMap API with location-based forecasts.

website.title: Website
website.description: Professional fitness website with responsive design and optimized performance.

todoList.title: Todo List
todoList.description: Full-stack task management app with React and MongoDB, featuring CRUD operations.

todoListJS.title: Todo List JS
todoListJS.description: Pure JavaScript todo application demonstrating DOM manipulation and vanilla JS skills.

kinesiologyLanding.title: Kinesiology Landing
kinesiologyLanding.description: Professional landing page for kinesiology services with responsive design and SEO optimization.

gymLanding.title: Gym Landing
gymLanding.description: Professional fitness website with responsive design and optimized performance.

tradeUPclone.title: Trade UP clone
tradeUPclone.description: Trade UP platform clone built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS.

templates.title: Services
templates.subtitle: Ready-to-deploy websites for your business. Pick a template, customize it, and go live.
templates.whatsappMessage: Hi! I'm interested in the template:

basicStore.name: Basic Store
basicStore.description: Give your store a professional online presence. Showcase your collections, receive inquiries via email and WhatsApp, and update your business info whenever you want.

adminStore.name: Premium Store
adminStore.description: Your complete online store. Products on display with prices and category filters. You upload and update your inventory from your own panel — no developer needed.

businessLanding.name: Business Landing
businessLanding.description: Professional landing page to present your company with all the essential sections.

cta.title: Do you have a project in mind?
cta.description: I'm open to new opportunities. Whether freelance, remote, or in-person.

brand.name: JRDev
brand.description: Full-stack developer. I build clean, fast, and accessible web experiences.
